languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

languages.text: "Ты так занятно подражаешь гемункулу в его извращенных интересах... Уроки Тервантьяса оставили след в твоем разуме, мон-кай. Интересно, в кого они превратят тебя годы спустя?"

"Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"
languages.original_text: "Ты так занятно подражаешь гемункулу в его извращенных интересах... Уроки Тервантьяса оставили след в твоем разуме, мон-кай. Интересно, в кого они превратят тебя годы спустя?"

"Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

"Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

languages.text: «Tu imitación de los Hemónculos y sus perversos intereses es profundamente divertida... Las lecciones de Tervantias han dejado huella en tu mente, mon-keigh. Me pregunto en qué te convertirán dentro de unos años».
languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

traits.locale_text: «Tu imitación de los Hemónculos y sus perversos intereses es profundamente divertida... Las lecciones de Tervantias han dejado huella en tu mente, mon-keigh. Me pregunto en qué te convertirán dentro de unos años».

languages.text: 「ハエモンクルスとその倒錯した嗜好の貴様の物真似は、実に愉快なものだ……テルヴァンティアスの教えは貴様の精神に痕跡を残したようだな、モンケイ。それが幾年か先、貴様を何に変えてしまうのか、見ものだ」
languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

traits.locale_text: 「ハエモンクルスとその倒錯した嗜好の貴様の物真似は、実に愉快なものだ……テルヴァンティアスの教えは貴様の精神に痕跡を残したようだな、モンケイ。それが幾年か先、貴様を何に変えてしまうのか、見ものだ」

languages.text: “你对血伶人及其变态癖好的模仿真是有模有样……特万提亚斯的教导在你心智上留下了烙印，猴子。我很好奇，几年后它们又会把你变成什么样子？”
languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

traits.locale_text: “你对血伶人及其变态癖好的模仿真是有模有样……特万提亚斯的教导在你心智上留下了烙印，猴子。我很好奇，几年后它们又会把你变成什么样子？”

languages.text: "Eure Imitation des Haemonculus und seiner pervertierten Interessen ist ausgesprochen unterhaltsam ... Tervantias' Lektionen haben Spuren in Eurem Verstand hinterlassen, Chem-Pan-Sey. Was sie Euch in den kommenden Jahren wohl einbringen werden?"
languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure Imitation des Haemonculus und seiner pervertierten Interessen ist ausgesprochen unterhaltsam ... Tervantias' Lektionen haben Spuren in Eurem Verstand hinterlassen, Chem-Pan-Sey. Was sie Euch in den kommenden Jahren wohl einbringen werden?"

languages.text: « Votre imitation de l'hémoncule et de ses intérêts pervers est tout à fait divertissante... Les leçons de Tervantias ont laissé une empreinte dans votre esprit, mon-keigh. Je me demande comment cela vous affectera dans les années à venir... »
languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre imitation de l'hémoncule et de ses intérêts pervers est tout à fait divertissante... Les leçons de Tervantias ont laissé une empreinte dans votre esprit, mon-keigh. Je me demande comment cela vous affectera dans les années à venir... »

languages.text: "Haimonkulus'u ve onun sapıkça ilgi alanlarını taklit etmen son derece eğlenceli... Tervantias'ın dersleri zihninde iz bırakmış mon-keigh. Yıllar sonra seni neye dönüştüreceklerini merak ediyorum."
languages.original_text: "Your imitation of the Haemonculus and his perverted interests is thoroughly entertaining... Tervantias's lessons have left their mark on your mind, mon-keigh. I wonder what they will turn you into years from now?"

traits.locale_text: "Haimonkulus'u ve onun sapıkça ilgi alanlarını taklit etmen son derece eğlenceli... Tervantias'ın dersleri zihninde iz bırakmış mon-keigh. Yıllar sonra seni neye dönüştüreceklerini merak ediyorum."
